codeReview.summary: Implementation in commit 87a2f95b correctly addresses VAL-DATA-001..006: $-escaping in AST replacement, corrupted-marker recovery in mergeClaudeMd, 4KB tail-reading in persistent-mode, session field preservation in clearBackgroundTasks, stale-running task failure marking in cleanupStaleBackgroundTasks, and ralph prompt field alignment in template keyword-detector.

issues.description: The new VAL-DATA-001 regression tests validate manual string replacement behavior but do not exercise astGrepReplaceTool's replacement execution path directly; a future regression inside the handler could bypass this test suite.
issues.actionableFix: Add at least one test that executes astGrepReplaceTool replacement flow (or extract and unit-test the exact replacement helper used by the handler) with captured text containing $&, $', and $` tokens.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The feature specifies skillName=bugfix-worker, but the skill is not registered; worker had to deviate and proceed manually.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: worker-transcripts.jsonl (session 19fd9988-2399-4ce4-82d3-c3797af9a9d5) contains: "Error: Skill \"bugfix-worker\" not found"; handoff.skillFeedback.followedProcedure=false with suggested change to register bugfix-worker skill.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission guidance expects .factory/services.yaml and .factory/library context, but these shared-state artifacts are missing in this repository, causing lookup failures during worker setup.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Read /home/paul/oh-my-claudecode/.factory/services.yaml -> ENOENT; LS /home/paul/oh-my-claudecode/.factory/library -> directory does not exist; transcript skeleton also shows worker attempted the same paths.

summary: Reviewed feature fix-data-integrity-bugs from worker session 19fd9988-2399-4ce4-82d3-c3797af9a9d5. Commit 87a2f95b satisfies VAL-DATA-001..006 by code inspection and targeted regression tests; one non-blocking test-fidelity gap was noted for AST replacement path coverage.
